title: lantana odorata
intro: Lantana odorata, also known as fragrant lantana, is a perennial shrub native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its clusters of small, fragrant flowers in shades of pink, yellow, and purple. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Lantana odorata include its ability to aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, Lantana odorata is often used in teas, infusions, and ointments to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
